extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE won from chaos after ACKERMANN crashed in final kilometer, VIVIANI followed wrong wheel (EWAN) from 5-6km out.
tactical_patterns: VIVIANI committed to EWAN wheel from 5-6km out, lacked positional flexibility when surprise attack came from DÉMARE.
Quick-Step organized leadout at 3km but crash inside 1km proves late positioning safer than early control on flat sprints.
DURBRIDGE Lotto-Soudal pulled back solo DURBRIDGE at 1.2km showing teams correctly calculated catch distance despite appearance of danger.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: first 2019 win from poor season, struck alone when favorites boxed in, demonstrates revival form
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: second place again, tactical error following EWAN wheel too early (5-6km) prevented adapting to DÉMARE surprise
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: crashed final kilometer eliminating win chance, positional error touching wheels on barriers approach
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: neutral: led out strongly but became decoy wheel trapping VIVIANI behind him
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: absent from final, significant weakness for expected sprint contender on flat finish
